version.description: API version identifier for endpoint routing

get.summary: Get email drafts for a record
get.description: Retrieves the list of email drafts associated with the specified record in the given module.

schema.description: Response containing the list of email drafts and additional info (e.g., pagination).

items.description: Email draft object with metadata, recipients and attachments.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the draft was last modified.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the draft was created.

$sharing_permission.description: Sharing permission level for the draft.

inventory_details.description: Inventory related details for the draft.

service_name.description: Name of the storage/service holding the file.

schedule_details.description: Scheduling information for when the draft should be sent.

rich_text.description: Indicates whether the content is rich text.

summary.description: Short summary or preview of the draft.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input or parameters.

post.summary: Create email drafts for a record
post.description: Creates one or more email drafts associated with the specified record in the given module.

schema.description: Request body for creating email drafts.

__email_drafts.description: List of email drafts to create.

inventory_details.description: Inventory details for the email draft.

schedule_details.description: Schedule details for the email draft.

rich_text.description: Whether the email content is rich text.

schema.description: Response object containing the result of created email drafts.

__email_drafts.description: List of created email draft results.

items.description: Result of a single created email draft.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input or parameters.

__email_drafts.description: Email drafts with invalid email addresses

403.description: Forbidden - the user does not have permission to perform the operation.

schema.description: Permission error response returned when the caller lacks required permissions.

code.description: Error code identifying the permission error.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the permission error.

details.description: Optional object containing additional details about the error.

get.description: Retrieves the specified email draft for the given record in the module.

200.description: When there is no drafts to show

schema.description: Response containing the list of email drafts and additional info (e.g., pagination).

items.description: Email draft object with metadata, recipients and attachments.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the draft was last modified.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the draft was created.

$sharing_permission.description: Sharing permission level for the draft.

inventory_details.description: Inventory related details for the draft.

service_name.description: Name of the storage/service holding the file.

schedule_details.description: Scheduling information for when the draft should be sent.

rich_text.description: Indicates whether the content is rich text.

summary.description: Short summary or preview of the draft.

put.description: Updates the specified email draft for the given record in the module.

schema.description: Request body for updating email drafts.

__email_drafts.description: List of email drafts to update.

inventory_details.description: Inventory details for the email draft.

schedule_details.description: Schedule details for the email draft.

rich_text.description: Whether the email content is rich text.

schema.description: Response object containing the result of updating email drafts.

__email_drafts.description: List of updated email draft results.

items.description: Result of a single updated email draft.

__email_drafts.description: Email drafts with invalid email addresses

delete.description: Deletes the specified email draft for the given record.

schema.description: Response object containing the result of deleting email drafts.

__email_drafts.description: List of deleted email draft results.

items.description: Result of a single deleted email draft.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input or parameters.
